song.title: Two Steers in Love
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Two Steers in Love' from Cowboys EP by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Two Steers in Love Lyrics - Cowboys EP
og.description: Full lyrics to Two Steers in Love from Cowboys EP.

twitter.title: Two Steers in Love Lyrics - Agust Islandia
twitter.description: Full official lyrics for Two Steers in Love.

essay: Two Steers in Love closes the EP with public declaration after secrecy. It transforms private affection into visible commitment, ending on pride rather than apology.
song.lyricsHtml:
Two steers in love by the fireside glow
Hearts untamed where the wild winds blow
We kept it a secret but the world should know
Two steers in love
And we won't let go

We met on the back road where the river runs slow
Boots in the dust but our hearts both know
Under white Texas skies where the coyotes roll
Two cowboys together but still riding alone

We sat by the fire with the stars up above
Whispered our names in the dark calling love
Every laugh was a risk every touch was a prayer
But the night held our secret like no one was there

Two steers in love by the fireside glow
Hearts untamed where the wild winds blow
We kept it a secret but the world should know
Two steers in love
And we won't let go

We hid from the daylight but we dreamed of the dawn
Two shadows together where the brave belong
Maybe tomorrow the world will see
Two steers in love
Riding proud and free

Now the sun's coming up on this old dusty land
Standing together hand in hand
No more shadows no more fear to hide
Two steers in love
And we're riding with pride

Two steers in love by the fireside glow
Hearts untamed where the wild winds blow
We kept it a secret but the whole world knows
Two steers in love
And we won't let go
